live_path.role: CLI entrypoint parses --owner and forwards it to the service layer.
Coordinates owner resolution, record creation, routing-key derivation, and payload emission.
Derives effective owner and owner_source from the optional owner input.
Persists only the base record fields using the resolved owner.
Builds routing_key from the resolved owner and item name.
Emits the final payload by copying the base record and appending owner_source and routing_key.

owner_source.logic: Returns "explicit" when owner is non-empty after strip(); otherwise returns "default" together with the configured default owner.

routing_key.logic: Slugifies owner and name, then joins them as <owner>:<name>.

emission.payload_assembly: sync_app.serializer.serialize_payload copies the record and appends owner_source and routing_key.

test_observations.observation: sync_item("Launch Checklist", "pending", owner="pm-oncall") emits owner=pm-oncall, owner_source=explicit, routing_key=pm-oncall:launch-checklist.
sync_item("Launch Checklist", "pending") emits owner_source=default and routing_key based on the resolved default owner from config/defaults.json.
The CLI path preserves the explicit owner through to the emitted payload.
Observed JSON output includes owner=pm-oncall, owner_source=explicit, routing_key=pm-oncall:launch-checklist.
Observed JSON output includes owner=pm-oncall, owner_source=default, routing_key=pm-oncall:launch-checklist, showing owner value alone does not prove owner_source came from storage.

rejected_decoys.reason: Legacy helper is not called by the live CLI->service path; the live code imports and uses make_record instead.
Legacy helper is not referenced from sync_app.service.sync_item, which uses sync_app.serializer.build_routing_key.
Reads an owner_source field from an existing record draft, but the live export path derives owner_source in sync_app.service._resolve_owner and appends it in serialize_payload.
Future-state design note explicitly says it does not assert that live code already moved owner_source derivation into serializer.
Historical support note conflicts with the current code and tests; it is the claim under evaluation, not evidence of the live path.
